title: Jane Wilson
compiled_truth: Jane Wilson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-21 to 2001-09-19), Jane Wilson sent 22 and received 131 emails, totalling 153 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (12), [Wade Cline](people/wade-cline) (6), [Neil Mcgregor](people/neil-mcgregor) (5), [Sanjay Bhatnagar](people/sanjay-bhatnagar) (3), [Ashok Mehta](people/ashok-mehta) (3).
timeline:
